---
title: "Features"
sidebar: en
---

Vitrine is the display case for Shiny apps that need to run without a server. An embedded WebR runtime executes the app locally; a WebView renders the UI.

![](../_screens/android-library.png){width=320}

## Modules

| Area | What it does |
|------|--------------|
| **Library** | List of imported apps with name, import source and status. |
| **Importer** | Four sources: file picker, URL, share sheet, raw source. |
| **Runner** | Launches the selected app in a local WebView against the embedded WebR runtime. |
| **Detail view** | Metadata, path, import date; remove or re-import. |

## Import flows

| Source | Expected form |
|--------|---------------|
| shinylive bundle (`.zip`) | contains `app.json` in shinylive format and runs as-is. |
| Raw-source bundle (`.zip` or folder) | `app.R` *or* `ui.R` + `server.R`; Vitrine packs it internally into shinylive form. |
| Raw-source snippet | R code pasted directly — Vitrine builds an `app.json` from a virtual `app.R`. |

## Runtime

| Component | Role |
|-----------|------|
| **WebR**           | R runtime as WebAssembly (R 4.6). |
| **shinylive**      | Shiny runtime, runnable in a browser/WebView. |
| **Local HTTP server** | Serves asset files with the COOP/COEP headers WebR needs for `SharedArrayBuffer`. Falls back to PostMessage otherwise. |

## Examples

| App | Purpose |
|-----|---------|
| **Sample (shinylive)** | Bundled demo: histogram + slider; shows the runner without further setup. |
| **Raw R sample** | Bundled example for the raw-source import path. |
| **Statistical power analysis** | Delivered as a Shiny app inside Vitrine — no separate app download needed. |

## Offline guarantee

Apps run fully inside the local WebAssembly sandbox. The only outgoing request is when you deliberately import an app from a URL.

## Where to get it

| Channel | App |
|---------|-----|
| App Store (iOS) · Google Play (Android) | Vitrine |
| F-Droid — Etabli's own repository | Vitrine (ships pre-built WASM runtimes) |
| Source code | [`etabli-dev/etabli-vitrine`](https://github.com/etabli-dev/etabli-vitrine) |
